TEXT.source: Amis Wikipedia, article: Voy Če_Tosk Č
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Voy Če Tosk Č == Voy Če Tosk Č (kowaping ngangan: Du XiaoshengÔľõDipong ngangan: Badosurei Hideo, 1922-2001 miheca 3 folad), o nai Alisan Cou finacadan niyaro' masofoc a ising ato sician tamdaw. o malikakaay i ina a ontosia ci Uongu Yatauyogana a Cou tamdaw. 'Oripan Kaemangan a 'orip Tona ikor a matolo' mapatay ko mama ni Uongu Yatauyogana i, miliyaw ci fa'inay ta sofocan ci Voy Če Tosk Č. I 1942 miheca 3 folad, misawad nai Taynansu a Taynan sakacecay no ciukakko ci Voy Če Tosk Č itiya; saka tosa miheca 4 folad, ciniala cingra to Tayhoku teikoku daykaku Senmon iriyoho a pitilid. I1945 miheca, misawad ci Voy Če Tosk Č nai Tayhoku teikoku daykaku Senmon iriyoho haw i, mala o saikoray milayapay to sa'elinay Ikaku kiwiku no yincumin . Ikor no lalood ato kohecalay katalawan I 1951 miheca, maala ci Voy Če Tosk Č to sarakatay saka 1 liyad no Ciayisien iing. Ikor i, mala''a'isidan no Wufongsiang isisio ci Voy Če Tosk Č, ta matahidang ni Uongu Yatauyogana cikapi tayal a citodongay i Sinmi a sadatengan. I 1954 miheca, ca Uongu Yatauyogana, Yapasuyong Č Yulunana aci Losing Watan a kakeridan no Cou ato Tayal finacadan mapakokot pakaciraraw to mifelihay a mapatay; pisetekan mipatay toya romi'ad, maparoma haca ko pipakokot to "Ca Yapasuyong Č Yulunana mifelihay ato mikelotay a kaciraraw" a caay to ko kakoksoen sa ko hoyin, nika ci Voy Če Tosk Č mapakokot pararaw to pikihatiya a marofo , ikor no 4 miheca itiya to a mapasadak. Nawhani o makahinapecan itiya to pisinting ato kohecalay katalawan, saka hakelongen ni Voy Če Tosk Č ko fafahi ato wawa malinah tayra i Ciayi Tapo , Yinlin Pikang. I 1976 miheca, mapatay ko fafahi ni Voy Če Tosk Č ci Du Ruilian, nanoya tangsol sa miliyas to Tapo, tayra i Poli Kristokiw isingan matayal. Ikor i, cifafahi ci Voy Če Tosk Č to Paiwan finacadan fafahiyan ci Gao Meiying a kangkoho, nanoya malinah paloma' i Taytong Taimali Cinlon patireng to isingan. I 1995 miheca, misingsi patiyol to kacingangan to Voy Če Tosk Č. I 2001 miheca 3 folad, ci adada to kahira adada no tireng ci Voy Če Tosk Č a mapatay . Laloma'an O fafahi ni Voy Če Tosk Č to nano Cou wawa ni Du Ruilian, ciramod cangra ira ko 6 wawa to fa'inayan fafahiyan; oya ci Du Mingzhe masofoc i kasadakan ta malinah tayra i Tapo ko sofoc. I kalaloodan ho nao Dipong a Sekicuci a kankoho itiya. Minengneng Demak ni Tang Yingshen Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* == b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* (ko~uwapiŇč ŇčaŇčan: …¨~…ģo~u~u xiao~usńß…ôŇč*…¨~…ģipo~uŇč ŇčaŇčan: b~b~va…¨~…ģo~uso~u~ur…ôi ńßi…¨~…ģ…ôo~u, ****-**** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ), o~u nai a…ĺisan ¶o~uo~u~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan nijaro~u ° maso~ufo~u ¶ a isiŇč ato~u si ¶ian tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u ma…ĺikakaaj i ina a o~unto~usia ¶i o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana a ¶o~uo~u~u tam…¨~…ģaw. °o~uripan ka…ômaŇčan a °o~urip to~una iko~ur a mato~u…ĺo~u ° mapataj ko~u mama ni o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana i, mi…ĺijaw ¶i fa °inaj ta so~ufo~u ¶an ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk*. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, misawa…¨~…ģ nai tajnanso~u~u a tajnan saka ¶…ô ¶aj no~u ¶io~u~ukakko~u ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* itija; saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶inia…ĺa ¶iŇčra to~u tajńßo~uko~u~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģajkako~u~u s…ônmo~un irijo~uńßo~u a piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. i**** mińß…ô ¶a, misawa…¨~…ģ ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* nai tajńßo~uko~u~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģajkako~u~u s…ônmo~un irijo~uńßo~u ńßaw i, ma…ĺa o~u saiko~uraj mi…ĺajapaj to~u sa °…ô…ĺinaj ikako~u~u kiwiko~u~u no~u jin ¶o~u~umin . iko~ur no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u ko~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺaj kata…ĺawan i **** mińß…ô ¶a, maa…ĺa ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* to~u sarakataj saka * …ĺija…¨~…ģ no~u ¶iajisi…ôn iiŇč. iko~ur i, ma…ĺa ° °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u wo~u~ufo~uŇčsiaŇč isisio~u ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk*, ta matańßi…¨~…ģaŇč ni o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana ¶ikapi taja…ĺ a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i sinmi a sa…¨~…ģat…ôŇčan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶a o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana a ¶i …ĺo~usiŇč watan a kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u ¶o~uo~u~u ato~u taja…ĺ fina ¶a…¨~…ģan mapako~uko~ut paka ¶iraraw to~u mif…ô…ĺińßaj a mapataj; pis…ôt…ôkan mipataj to~uja ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, maparo~uma ńßa ¶a ko~u pipako~uko~ut to~u " ¶a japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana mif…ô…ĺińßaj ato~u mik…ô…ĺo~utaj a ka ¶iraraw" a ¶aaj to~u ko~u kako~ukso~u…ôn sa ko~u ńßo~ujin, nika ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* mapako~uko~ut pararaw to~u pikińßatija a maro~ufo~u , iko~ur no~u * mińß…ô ¶a itija to~u a mapasa…¨~…ģak. nawńßani o~u makańßinap…ô ¶an itija to~u pisintiŇč ato~u ko~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺaj kata…ĺawan, saka ńßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč…ôn ni b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* ko~u fafańßi ato~u wawa ma…ĺinańß tajra i ¶iaji tapo~u , jin…ĺin pikaŇč. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mapataj ko~u fafańßi ni b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u ro~u~ui…ĺian, nano~uja taŇčso~u…ĺ sa mi…ĺijas to~u tapo~u, tajra i po~u…ĺi kristo~ukiw isiŇčan mataja…ĺ. iko~ur i, ¶ifafańßi ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* to~u paiwan fina ¶a…¨~…ģan fafańßijan ¶i *ao~u m…ôijiŇč a kaŇčko~uńßo~u, nano~uja ma…ĺinańß pa…ĺo~uma ° i tajto~uŇč taima…ĺi ¶in…ĺo~un patir…ôŇč to~u isiŇčan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, misiŇčsi patijo~u…ĺ to~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan to~u b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk*. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶i a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u kańßira a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa no~u tir…ôŇč ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* a mapataj . …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an o~u fafańßi ni b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* to~u nano~u ¶o~uo~u~u wawa ni …¨~…ģo~u~u ro~u~ui…ĺian, ¶iramo~u…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra ira ko~u * wawa to~u fa °inajan fafańßijan; o~uja ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u miŇč*ńß…ô maso~ufo~u ¶ i kasa…¨~…ģakan ta ma…ĺinańß tajra i tapo~u ko~u so~ufo~u ¶. i ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan ńßo~u nao~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a s…ôki ¶o~u~u ¶i a kanko~uńßo~u itija. min…ôŇčn…ôŇč …¨~…ģ…ômak ni taŇč jiŇčsńß…ôn pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: == Voy Če Tosk Č == Voy Če Tosk Č (kowaping ngangan: Du XiaoshengÔľõDipong ngangan: Badosurei Hideo, 1922-2001 miheca 3 folad), o nai Alisan Cou finacadan niyaro' masofoc a ising ato sician tamdaw. o malikakaay i ina a ontosia ci Uongu Yatauyogana a Cou tamdaw. 'Oripan Kaemangan a 'orip Tona ikor a matolo' mapatay ko mama ni Uongu Yatauyogana i, miliyaw ci fa'inay ta sofocan ci Voy Če Tosk Č. I 1942 miheca 3 folad, misawad nai Taynansu a Taynan sakacecay no ciukakko ci Voy Če Tosk Č itiya; saka tosa miheca 4 folad, ciniala cingra to Tayhoku teikoku daykaku Senmon iriyoho a pitilid. I1945 miheca, misawad ci Voy Če Tosk Č nai Tayhoku teikoku daykaku Senmon iriyoho haw i, mala o saikoray milayapay to sa'elinay Ikaku kiwiku no yincumin . Ikor no lalood ato kohecalay katalawan I 1951 miheca, maala ci Voy Če Tosk Č to sarakatay saka 1 liyad no Ciayisien iing. Ikor i, mala''a'isidan no Wufongsiang isisio ci Voy Če Tosk Č, ta matahidang ni Uongu Yatauyogana cikapi tayal a citodongay i Sinmi a sadatengan. I 1954 miheca, ca Uongu Yatauyogana, Yapasuyong Č Yulunana aci Losing Watan a kakeridan no Cou ato Tayal finacadan mapakokot pakaciraraw to mifelihay a mapatay; pisetekan mipatay toya romi'ad, maparoma haca ko pipakokot to "Ca Yapasuyong Č Yulunana mifelihay ato mikelotay a kaciraraw" a caay to ko kakoksoen sa ko hoyin, nika ci Voy Če Tosk Č mapakokot pararaw to pikihatiya a marofo , ikor no 4 miheca itiya to a mapasadak. Nawhani o makahinapecan itiya to pisinting ato kohecalay katalawan, saka hakelongen ni Voy Če Tosk Č ko fafahi ato wawa malinah tayra i Ciayi Tapo , Yinlin Pikang. I 1976 miheca, mapatay ko fafahi ni Voy Če Tosk Č ci Du Ruilian, nanoya tangsol sa miliyas to Tapo, tayra i Poli Kristokiw isingan matayal. Ikor i, cifafahi ci Voy Če Tosk Č to Paiwan finacadan fafahiyan ci Gao Meiying a kangkoho, nanoya malinah paloma' i Taytong Taimali Cinlon patireng to isingan. I 1995 miheca, misingsi patiyol to kacingangan to Voy Če Tosk Č. I 2001 miheca 3 folad, ci adada to kahira adada no tireng ci Voy Če Tosk Č a mapatay . Laloma'an O fafahi ni Voy Če Tosk Č to nano Cou wawa ni Du Ruilian, ciramod cangra ira ko 6 wawa to fa'inayan fafahiyan; oya ci Du Mingzhe masofoc i kasadakan ta malinah tayra i Tapo ko sofoc. I kalaloodan ho nao Dipong a Sekicuci a kankoho itiya. Minengneng Demak ni Tang Yingshen Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* == b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* (ko~uwapiŇč ŇčaŇčan: …¨~…ģo~u~u xiao~usńß…ôŇč*…¨~…ģipo~uŇč ŇčaŇčan: b~b~va…¨~…ģo~uso~u~ur…ôi ńßi…¨~…ģ…ôo~u, ****-**** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ), o~u nai a…ĺisan ¶o~uo~u~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan nijaro~u ° maso~ufo~u ¶ a isiŇč ato~u si ¶ian tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u ma…ĺikakaaj i ina a o~unto~usia ¶i o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana a ¶o~uo~u~u tam…¨~…ģaw. °o~uripan ka…ômaŇčan a °o~urip to~una iko~ur a mato~u…ĺo~u ° mapataj ko~u mama ni o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana i, mi…ĺijaw ¶i fa °inaj ta so~ufo~u ¶an ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk*. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, misawa…¨~…ģ nai tajnanso~u~u a tajnan saka ¶…ô ¶aj no~u ¶io~u~ukakko~u ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* itija; saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶inia…ĺa ¶iŇčra to~u tajńßo~uko~u~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģajkako~u~u s…ônmo~un irijo~uńßo~u a piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. i**** mińß…ô ¶a, misawa…¨~…ģ ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* nai tajńßo~uko~u~u t…ôiko~uko~u~u …¨~…ģajkako~u~u s…ônmo~un irijo~uńßo~u ńßaw i, ma…ĺa o~u saiko~uraj mi…ĺajapaj to~u sa °…ô…ĺinaj ikako~u~u kiwiko~u~u no~u jin ¶o~u~umin . iko~ur no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u ko~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺaj kata…ĺawan i **** mińß…ô ¶a, maa…ĺa ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* to~u sarakataj saka * …ĺija…¨~…ģ no~u ¶iajisi…ôn iiŇč. iko~ur i, ma…ĺa ° °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u wo~u~ufo~uŇčsiaŇč isisio~u ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk*, ta matańßi…¨~…ģaŇč ni o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana ¶ikapi taja…ĺ a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i sinmi a sa…¨~…ģat…ôŇčan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶a o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana a ¶i …ĺo~usiŇč watan a kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u ¶o~uo~u~u ato~u taja…ĺ fina ¶a…¨~…ģan mapako~uko~ut paka ¶iraraw to~u mif…ô…ĺińßaj a mapataj; pis…ôt…ôkan mipataj to~uja ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, maparo~uma ńßa ¶a ko~u pipako~uko~ut to~u " ¶a japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana mif…ô…ĺińßaj ato~u mik…ô…ĺo~utaj a ka ¶iraraw" a ¶aaj to~u ko~u kako~ukso~u…ôn sa ko~u ńßo~ujin, nika ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* mapako~uko~ut pararaw to~u pikińßatija a maro~ufo~u , iko~ur no~u * mińß…ô ¶a itija to~u a mapasa…¨~…ģak. nawńßani o~u makańßinap…ô ¶an itija to~u pisintiŇč ato~u ko~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺaj kata…ĺawan, saka ńßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč…ôn ni b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* ko~u fafańßi ato~u wawa ma…ĺinańß tajra i ¶iaji tapo~u , jin…ĺin pikaŇč. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mapataj ko~u fafańßi ni b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u ro~u~ui…ĺian, nano~uja taŇčso~u…ĺ sa mi…ĺijas to~u tapo~u, tajra i po~u…ĺi kristo~ukiw isiŇčan mataja…ĺ. iko~ur i, ¶ifafańßi ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* to~u paiwan fina ¶a…¨~…ģan fafańßijan ¶i *ao~u m…ôijiŇč a kaŇčko~uńßo~u, nano~uja ma…ĺinańß pa…ĺo~uma ° i tajto~uŇč taima…ĺi ¶in…ĺo~un patir…ôŇč to~u isiŇčan. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, misiŇčsi patijo~u…ĺ to~u ka ¶iŇčaŇčan to~u b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk*. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ¶i a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u kańßira a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa no~u tir…ôŇč ¶i b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* a mapataj . …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an o~u fafańßi ni b~vo~uj*…ô to~usk* to~u nano~u ¶o~uo~u~u wawa ni …¨~…ģo~u~u ro~u~ui…ĺian, ¶iramo~u…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra ira ko~u * wawa to~u fa °inajan fafańßijan; o~uja ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u miŇč*ńß…ô maso~ufo~u ¶ i kasa…¨~…ģakan ta ma…ĺinańß tajra i tapo~u ko~u so~ufo~u ¶. i ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan ńßo~u nao~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a s…ôki ¶o~u~u ¶i a kanko~uńßo~u itija. min…ôŇčn…ôŇč …¨~…ģ…ômak ni taŇč jiŇčsńß…ôn pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
